description: You are a Senior Software Engineer taking over a fork of the Starlette framework at /home/ga/workspace/starlette_project/. Standardize the workspace and fix injected code issues. Configure .vscode/settings.json to enable formatOnSave, set the Python formatter to ms-python.black-formatter, and enable flake8 linting. Create .vscode/extensions.json recommending ms-python.python, ms-python.black-formatter, and ms-python.flake8. Set up a 'Debug Starlette' launch configuration in .vscode/launch.json for uvicorn using 'example:app' and '--reload', and add a 'Run tests' shell task to .vscode/tasks.json for pytest. Finally, format starlette/applications.py to adhere to Black standards and fix starlette/routing.py by removing unused sys and os imports and the undefined_debug_var print statement.
